import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
let a = match parts.get(0)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
when None
  0
end
let b = match parts.get(1)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
when None
  0
end
let s = match parts.get(2)
when Some(t)
  match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    1
  end
when None
  1
end

mut out = ""
mut cur = a
mut first = true
while cur < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end
println(out)
